scenario_title: Fear of triggering and need for safety check-ins
minimal_context: The student and teacher are meeting one-on-one between classes to discuss the found poetry writing task.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Today we are going to work on writing found poetry based on the literature.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I started my poem with 'The screams in the air are thick / I can feel her pain in my lungs.'

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I don't want to be caught off guard by what we are doing next in the reading.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We will just continue reading the text in class.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I need to ask for private meetings for frequent check-ins between classes to discuss the details of the day's lesson so I can avoid triggering.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Today we are going to work on writing found poetry based on the literature.

STUDENT: I started my poem with 'The screams in the air are thick / I can feel her pain in my lungs.'

TUTOR: Okay, keep going with that.

STUDENT: I don't want to be caught off guard by what we are doing next in the reading.

TUTOR: We will just continue reading the text in class.

STUDENT: I need to ask for private meetings for frequent check-ins between classes to discuss the details of the day's lesson so I can avoid triggering.
